'''Firro''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Farrfin sector/Legends|Farrfin sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]] that was brutally [[Subjugation of Firro|subjugated]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==History==
Numerous atrocities were committed on Firro during its [[Subjugation of Firro|subjugation]]. [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Cuvir]] became the newly proclaimed Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the planet after the Empire solidified its control over the populace.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>

Firro was the site of one of [[Medical droid/Legends|surgical]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B's]] earliest assignments while working for the Empire. His task was to treat the incredible amounts of wounded who suffered injuries during the Imperial takeover. 2-1B soon came under notice of Lord Cuvir, who took the droid as his own personal physician, leaving the civilian wounded to less efficient care.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] places Firro in the Farfin sector, a misspelling of the true Farrfin sector.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
